justification:
Harvest & Co deducted $11,000 for 44 in-store demo events × $250 under PROMO-2026-Q1-010 (Holiday In-Store Demo Program — Pretzels & Cold Brew). The referenced promotion is valid: it covers the correct SKUs (MF-SN-002 and MF-BV-102), the authorized rate of $250/event, the claimed period (2025-11-03 to 2025-12-14), and has a $15,000 funding cap. No duplicate settlement was found for deduction ref "hc 20655."

However, as of claim submission, no signed Proof-of-Performance (Exhibit B) forms or store execution reports have been provided. The remittance states "POP forms coming." Contract section 3.4 requires a signed Exhibit B and store execution report for each demo event, submitted within 30 days of the event; claims lacking this documentation "are not payable as submitted."

Partial settlement is supported by two corroborating evidence sources: (1) store photos from 23 stores across the Nov/Dec demo period, and (2) strong POS scan lift on both SKUs across all six promo weeks (10,540 units scanned), consistent with active in-store demo execution. These together satisfy the corroboration threshold established in Meridian precedent SH-2025-Q4-007 (demo billbacks missing Exhibit B, but corroborated by photos and scan lift, settle at 60%).

Applying the 60% convention: $11,000 × 60% = $6,600. This amount is below the $10,000 auto-settlement threshold. The remaining 40% ($4,400) is withheld pending submission of the signed Exhibit B forms. Upon receipt of compliant documentation for the remaining events, the balance may be reconsidered.
